name: Fresh Vegetable Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Tear the mixed salad greens into bite-sized pieces.
2. Toss all salad ingredients in a large bowl and arrange on a serving platter.
3. To make the dressing, dry roast the sesame seeds in a small frying pan over medium heat, stirring often until golden brown, about 2 to 4 minutes. Set aside to cool.
4. In a separate bowl, whisk together the garlic, crushed red peppers, brown rice syrup, lime juice, tamari, and water.
5. Pour the dressing over the salad and toss gently to combine.
6. Garnish with sesame seeds and chopped peanuts.
7. Serve at room temperature.
